description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by a fenced yard with a swimming pool and outdoor seating areas. The structure features a large, sloped roof and multiple rectangular windows along its facades, providing ample natural light. The front entrance is accessible via a set of steps leading to a covered porch, which is furnished with outdoor tables and chairs. The backyard includes a spacious deck with additional seating and a dining area, as well as a pool bordered by lounge chairs and landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs. The property is enclosed by a tall fence with decorative lighting, ensuring privacy and security. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a sloped roof, fenced yard, pool, and multiple outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sloped roof, backyard deck, and poolside lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, windows, and fenced perimeter.
description_view_3: Angled front view with clear visibility of the entrance steps, porch, and landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
